hero.title: Resume & JD — Perfect Match in One Click
hero.subtitle: Upload your resume, paste the target job link, and let AI instantly analyze the match rate with professional optimization suggestions to make your resume stand out.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: AI-powered resume-job matching analysis to precisely target your job search

multiDomain.title: Smart Match Analysis
multiDomain.description: Deep semantic AI understanding compares your resume against job descriptions across multiple dimensions, quantifying your competitiveness precisely.

aiFollowUp.title: Multi-Dimensional Evaluation
aiFollowUp.description: Comprehensive analysis across four key dimensions — skills, experience, education, and keywords — clearly highlighting your strengths and gaps.

instantFeedback.title: Instant Optimization Tips
instantFeedback.description: Receive targeted resume optimization suggestions immediately after analysis, teaching you how to tailor your resume for higher match rates.

history.title: Match History Tracking
history.description: All matching records are saved permanently. Review and compare matches across different positions anytime to track your resume iteration progress.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Complete resume-job matching analysis in three steps

step1.title: Upload Resume
step1.description: Upload your resume file (PDF/DOCX supported), and AI will automatically parse your resume content and skill tags.

step2.title: Paste Job Link
step2.description: Copy the target job link from platforms like Boss Zhipin or Lagou, and the system will automatically extract the JD for deep analysis.

step3.title: Get Match Report
step3.description: AI instantly generates a detailed match report covering multi-dimensional scores, skill gap analysis, and resume optimization suggestions.

cta.title: Ready to make your resume stand out?
cta.subtitle: Sign up now and try AI resume matching for free

aiAssistant.title: AI Resume Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Smart resume optimization & job matching assistant
aiAssistant.welcome: Hello! I'm the JDMatch AI assistant, focused on resume optimization and job matching analysis. You can ask me about:

suggestions.skill: What skills do I need to improve?

aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything, e.g. How to highlight my project experience...
aiAssistant.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
aiAssistant.error: AI service is temporarily unavailable, please try again later
